title: Peohud 3 Pcs Notched Tiling Trowel, Stainless Steel Square Notched Trowel, Flat Finishing Concrete Trowel for Tile Cement Drywall Plastering Wall Floor Tiling Installation, Masonry Hand Tool Kit
features: Great Value Pack: You will get 3 pcs concrete trowels. The overall size is approx 11" x 4", and the notch size is 5/32" x 5/32"( 4mm x 4mm ), 5/16" x 5/16" ( 8mm x 8mm ), 1/2" x 1/2"( 12mm x 12mm ). 3 different notch size will meet your different needs.

Notched Design: The square notched trowel makes it easy to apply a specific amount of mortar, avoiding air holes and allowing the tiles to fit tightly to the floor.It is ideal for accurately applying in a variety of tile projects.

Premium Quality: Peohud tile tools are made of high quality polished stainless steel for superior strength and durability, and will not rust or break, ensuring long-lasting performance in tile installations.

Ergonomic handles: Plastic and rubber handles designed with ergonomic principles, comfortable to hold, easy to operate, and can reduce hand fatigue caused by long hours of work, making your work more efficient and precise.
Wide Applications: The flat finishing trowel set is great for applying, spreading, flattening, polishing concrete, cement, plaster, tile, drywall and other projects.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Hand Tools > Masonry & Tiling Tools > Trowels > Finishing Trowels
